clinical_history: Patient reports experiencing headaches, eye pain, back pain, and knee pain. Headache has been present for approximately one month, eye pain for two days.

detailed_findings.explanation: Patient reports headache lasting for about a month.
Patient reports eye pain lasting for two days.

impression_summary: Patient presents with multiple pain symptoms including headache, eye pain, back pain, and knee pain. Duration and severity vary.
recommendations: Further evaluation to determine the cause of the headache and eye pain.
Consider imaging or physical examination for back and knee pain.
